summary: go test ./... all packages PASS; pnpm typecheck 0 errors. Commit 43f4ecdc on main.

Host Skills empty states verified via CDP: (A) pre-host Welcome shown before any host configured; (B) Dashboard shows 'Last Scan: Never' immediately after host.choose - not-yet-scanned indicator present; (C) Skills Library auto-scans on mount so not-yet-scanned state on that screen is sub-second transient by design; (D) No-skills-found state shows distinct message 'No skills found - The host folder scan ran but found no skills. Add skill folders to your Skill Host Folder and scan again.' - correctly distinguishes from not-scanned.
residual_risk: Scan-in-progress spinner and scan-failed states are sub-second transient and not capturable via CDP. See TC-SETUP-006-scanning-substate below.
decision_basis: Three of four empty-state branches pass with CDP+screenshot evidence. Scanning/failed sub-states are harness-speed limitations.

summary: Scan-in-progress spinner sub-state not capturable via CDP: auto-scan against local fixture completes in under 100ms. Recommend adding an artificial delay fixture or an in-flight operation polling endpoint to the harness for future runs.
decision_basis: Harness speed limitation, not a product defect.

summary: Project Detail for scanned no-provider project shows 'No provider folders detected' with guidance including .agents/skills and .claude/skills examples plus 'scan again to detect'. No install-action buttons shown. Filesystem check confirms only README.md under project fixture after detail view - no provider directories auto-created by the app. PROVIDER PLUGINS section shows 'not configured' per layer. Never-scanned state auto-scans on mount (sub-second); the post-scan no-provider guidance is the verifiable and correct state.
decision_basis: Core assertions confirmed: guidance shown, no folders created, no phantom provider detections.

summary: Global Skills provider tab bar confirmed: All(2), Antigravity CLI(0), Claude(0), Codex(0), Shared Agent Skills(2), OpenCode(0), Pi(0). Shared Agent Skills tab shows qa-global-skill-1 and qa-global-skill-2 with status 'current'. Claude tab shows 'missing' badge and 'No global skills found.' - clear empty state. All tab restores full list. DB confirms generic_agents active, claude missing, all others disabled. All TC-GLOBAL-008 assertions pass.

Global Plugins provider tab bar confirmed: All(2), Claude(2), Codex(0), Antigravity CLI(0). Claude tab shows qa-plugin (enabled, 1.0.0) and qa-disabled (disabled, 0.2.0). Codex tab shows 'not configured' badge with settings path and 'Some settings in this file are managed outside Skillbox.' - clear empty state. All tab restores both plugins. DB confirms claude scan_status=ok with 2 entries, codex/antigravity_cli missing. All TC-PLUGIN-010 assertions pass.
